description_long: This is a white ushanka-style winter hat with a prominent red star emblem centered on the front, reminiscent of Soviet military or medical headgear. The hat features a thick, padded construction, likely designed for warmth, with red fabric panels accenting the crown and sides. The crown is rounded and segmented, with the red sections forming a geometric pattern that converges at the top. The ear flaps are integrated into the main body, giving the hat a voluminous, insulated appearance. The red star emblem is the only visible decorative element, positioned above the forehead. The overall design suggests functionality for cold weather, with a distinctive visual identity tied to historical or cultural symbolism.
description: A white ushanka-style winter hat with red crown accents and a central red star emblem, designed for warmth and featuring a rounded, padded shape.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red star emblem centered above the forehead and the symmetrical red crown panels.
description_view_1: Left rear oblique view highlights the white padded body and the red accent panel extending toward the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the convergence of red panels at the crown and the full rounded shape of the hat.
description_view_3: Right rear oblique view mirrors the left, showing the red accent and the hat's voluminous, insulated structure.
